title: erigeron delphiniifolius var. oreophilus
intro: Erigeron delphiniifolius var. oreophilus, also known as the alpine fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its antitussive and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Erigeron delphiniifolius var. oreophilus include its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
